reason: Unlocking Chain-of-thought (CoT) will improve my reasoning accuracy for higher-level questions, ensuring I maximize XP gain and minimize HP loss.

Unlocking 'pe_plan' grants the Reflection skill, which provides a critical second chance to review and correct answers, as well as a planning block to structure complex reasoning. This is a vital safety net for higher-level doors.
